  1. org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config
Package that contains implementation of creating RouterFunctions from external configuration.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke
Interfaces and classes relating to invoking operation methods.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke.convert
Converter support for configuration based RouterFunctions, Filters and Predicates.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.invoke.reflect
Reflection support for loading RouterFunctions from configuration.

    Description
    OperationParameters
    A collection of operation parameters.

    Class
    Description
    InvocationContext
    The context for the invocation of an operation.
    MissingParametersException
    RuntimeException thrown when an endpoint invocation does not contain required parameters.
    OperationArgumentResolver
    Resolver for an argument of an
    invalid reference 
    Operation
    .
    OperationParameter
    A single operation parameter.
    ParameterMappingException
    A ParameterMappingException is thrown when a failure occurs during operation parameter mapping.
    ParameterValueMapper
    Maps parameter values to the required type when invoking an endpoint.
